---
title: "Arthur Duke Yonge"
---

## Arthur Duke Yonge

**Dates:** (11 June 1820-1909)

### Description

cousin of CMY

### Biography

Son of the Rev. Duke Yonge, Vicar of Antony, he married (1870) Lucy Williams (d.1879).  He was educated at Exeter College, Oxford, became a landscape artist, had one daughter Alethea Yonge (b. Italy 1870/1).  He may have become a Roman Catholic like his brother John. [<i>Alumni Oxonienses</i>, Coleridge, <i>Life</i> 69]

### Letters

- Letter from May 2 [1900]
- Letter from July 29th [1885?[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from Decr 12th [?1873]
- Letter from Friday [17 March 1854]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
